---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Technical deep dives, architecture notes, and product explorations."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
listing:
  id: all-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  image-height: "200px"
  image-placeholder: images/ocp-install.svg
---

::: {#all-posts}
:::
